nasb.text: For thus Amos says, ‘Jeroboam will die by the sword and Israel will certainly go from its land into exile.’ ”

esv.text: For thus Amos has said, “‘Jeroboam shall die by the sword, and Israel must go into exile away from his land.’”

cnv.text: 因為阿摩司這樣說： ‘耶羅波安必死在刀下， 以色列必被擄， 離開本國。’”

ccb.text: 因为阿摩司这样说，‘耶罗波安将丧身刀下，以色列人必被掳去，远离家乡。’”
